overview: Lich is a Boss-class Undead monster found in Crypt. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 2000 HP, 40 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Close Attack at 0% ratio (0 base damage). Sight range 1500, behavior tree: BT_Lich.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Close Attack (0%), Normal Attack (0%), Strong Attack (0%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Resists: Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 250
strategies.description: Has 250 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1500 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1500 units, loses target at 4000 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: HP Phase Triggers
strategies.description: HPRatio Curse Trigger Cycle: 20%. These HP thresholds trigger phase transitions, summons, or special attacks.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1500 units. Loses target at 4000 units.
